hooks.text: ...you're an "eternal student" who constantly gathers knowledge but never turns it into results?
...you wake up already without energy, and every new step feels like a struggle?
...you see others growing manifold, while you are always waiting for something?
...you feel like an impostor (impostor syndrome), despite your real solid successes?
...you live in "deferred life" mode, constantly preparing for a real start that never comes?

Hero.subHeadline: Your Shadow ($Shadow$) is secretly blocking your path through sabotage scenarios. We don't teach you marketing — we remove internal friction ($SFI$), which makes you stall where you should be soaring.

Author.desc1: Igor Sherlock is more than a mentor. He is an engineer who deconstructs your business and your mind like a complex mechanism, finding hidden bugs where others see "just laziness" or "bad market".
Author.desc2: Founder of Sherlock Capital, creator of the SFI protocol, and author of the Zero Friction methodology. His mission is to turn your struggle into a smooth, high-speed move towards scaling.

cards.title: NATURE OF INTERNAL STALLING
cards.description: External tools (MBA, hiring, marketing) are just "body kits". If the engine (your psyche) operates with Friction Tax, speed won't increase. You're not broken. You just need an engine "firmware" update to the Launch Control version.

cards.title: WHO IS BRAKING YOUR HYPERCAR?
cards.description: Your "Guardians" are fears and blocks that once saved you, but today have turned into speed limiters. They fear your scale as much as you do.

cards.title: HIDDEN POWER RESERVE
cards.description: Your "Golden Shadow" is suppressed potential, aggression, and scale. Unpacking these qualities gives an immediate boost in efficiency and profit without increasing the load.

Sabotage.title: SELF-SABOTAGE IS NOT AN ERROR. IT IS A PROTECTIVE PROTOCOL.
Sabotage.subTitle: “Why 95% of attempts to ‘start a new life’ end with a return to the starting point.”
Sabotage.setPointDesc1: Your psyche has a “set point”. This is your internal level of normal: the amount of money, volume of responsibility, and level of stress that the system considers “safe”.
Sabotage.setPointQuote: “This is your version of minimum acceptable habits.”
Sabotage.willpowerDesc: Trying to maintain results on willpower alone is like trying to hold a stretched spring with your hands. Sooner or later, the resources of the prefrontal cortex will be exhausted, and the spring (your Guardian) will return you to your place with double force.

steps.title: Impulse
steps.desc: You set the “maximum achievable goal” through willpower.

steps.title: Tension
steps.desc: Rapid growth creates excessive pressure on the system. Your Friction Index ($SFI$) enters the red zone.

steps.title: Guardian Activation
steps.desc: Your safety mechanism (Guardian) perceives success as a threat to stability (unknown = danger).

steps.title: Pressure Release (Sabotage)
steps.desc: To save you from “overheating”, the Guardian turns on laziness, illness, out of focus, or wrong decisions.

steps.title: Rollback
steps.desc: The system forcibly returns you to the “safe harbor” — to your minimal habits. Often deeper than it was before the start.

Sabotage.solutionTitle:
We don't teach you to “jump higher”.
We are engaged in flashing the foundation.
solutionItems: We find shadow aspects that your Guardian considers “dangerous”.
We integrate them into your Set-point.

Science.quote: “We don't just fix your state. We rewrite your workflow for a new level of scale.”

steps.title: SEARCH BUG
steps.desc: Deep search for bugs in your neural network that prevent you from seeing growth opportunities.

steps.title: EXTRACT CAPITAL
steps.desc: Unpacking your “Golden Shadow” — hidden talents and aggressive potential.

steps.title: REWRITE PROTOCOL
steps.desc: Implementing the new SFI 1.0 firmware for operation in Zero Friction mode.

Comparative.title: The Illusion of Choice
Comparative.subTitle: Why classic methods of working with state and business DO NOT GIVE RESULTS at the level of SUPER-TASKS. Choose not between “best”, but between “WORKING”.

column1.title: Conventional Therapy
column1.verdict: ANALYSIS WITHOUT REASSEMBLY. THE SYSTEM REMAINS IN THE OLD ARCHITECTURE.

items.primary: Searching for reasons in the past
items.secondary: Digging into childhood does not change the current neural chains of sabotage here and now.
The lack of a deadline allows the psyche to imitate work without results for years.
Understanding the problem does not provide tools for its technical elimination.

column2.title: Coaching and Training
column2.verdict: EXTERNAL GLOSS. THE “GUARDIAN” SYSTEM QUICKLY REPRESSES THIS IMPULSE.

items.secondary: An attempt to implement skills on an old foundation leads to rapid rejection.
Willpower resource is limited — the system always returns you to the comfort point.
A temporary rise in training is replaced by an even deeper rollback.

column3.title: Shadow Sprint (SFI)
column3.verdict: ZERO FRICTION. SUSTAINABLE TRANSITION TO A NEW LEVEL OF INCOME AND ENERGY.

items.secondary: We don’t motivate, we reassemble your personality architecture for new tasks.
The short cycle of changes does not give the safety mechanisms time to react.
The methodology bypasses Ego resistance, making the quantum leap natural.

Dashboard.subTitle: The Sherlock Shadow system doesn't give “advice”. We introduce changes directly into your business architecture, turning chaos into measurable results.

results.label: PROFIT CONVERSION
results.desc: Net profit growth due to the elimination of internal system bugs.

results.label: SOVEREIGN LEADERSHIP
results.desc: Transition to the Master state, where you dictate the rules of the game to the market.

results.label: FREEDOM LEVEL
results.desc: Exit from operations without losing control and product quality.

faqs.a: Your Guardian is winning time. Every week of delay is not just lost profit, it is a resource that your Shadow ($Shadow$) burns right now. The system does not forgive inaction in conditions of limit loads.

faqs.q: WHY SHADOW IS MORE IMPORTANT THAN MARKETING?
faqs.a: Marketing is gasoline. If there is a hole in your engine tank (Friction Tax), you just pour money into the asphalt. We don't hang a new fairing on the car, we fix the engine itself.

This is your internal protection mechanism. It sabotages your growth, masquerading as 'common sense' and 'rational planning'. Its task is to leave you where it is 'safe' for you, but where there is no scale.
Shadow Friction Index is a digitized indicator of your internal resistance. This is a technical parameter that shows how much effort your system spends on fighting itself.

FinalLaunch.title: Your new
FinalLaunch.quote: “We don't promise it will be easy. We promise that you will stop stalling and start soaring.”

scenarios.label: VITALITY
scenarios.desc: Checking the level of vital resource and system resistance to external loads.

scenarios.label: SOVEREIGN
scenarios.desc: Assessment of inner power and freedom from unconscious manipulations.

scenarios.label: EXPANSION
scenarios.desc: Measuring growth capacity without activating self-sabotage protocols.

scenarios.label: ARCHITECT
scenarios.desc: Analysis of structural integrity and system logic of your business.

FinalLaunch.testDesc: Take a 12-question test to get an accurate calculation of the Shadow Friction Index ($SFI$) for 4 key scenarios.

ShadowTax.desc1: The problem is not marketing or the team. You pay an invisible tax on success — Shadow Friction.
ShadowTax.desc2: Every action you take passes through an internal filter of sabotage. You spend 80% of your energy fighting yourself, and only 20% on real growth.

SocialProof.title: GALLERY OF MANIFESTATION
SocialProof.subTitle: Scale that becomes natural. Energy that goes into results, not struggle.

Solution.desc1: While the market is stalling and trying to 'squeeze' the result through discipline, you get a superpower.
Solution.desc2: Shadow integration is driving without brakes. You direct 100% of the energy into motion, going into a point. This advantage cannot be bought.

Superpower.desc1: While competitors are burning rubber in attempts to “force” themselves to work, you direct 100% of the energy into movement.
Superpower.desc2: This is your unfair advantage. Superpower is when your internal engine no longer fights with the braking system.

DangerZone.desc1:
It is impossible to see the Shadow on your own.
Trying to do it yourself, you fall into a loop:
DangerZone.resultTitle: The result is a point “below zero”.
DangerZone.resultDesc: Either Sprint and objective control, or a burned-out engine of your system.
